mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, C.total_participants, B.nickname FROM meetups A LEFT JOIN members B ON B.member_id = A.member_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT meetup_id, COUNT(*) AS total_participants FROM meetup_applications WHERE 1=1 AND status ='APPROVED' AND delete_yn = 'N' GROUP BY meetup_id ) C ON C.meetup_id = A.meetup_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N'
AND A.status = #{status}
AND A.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
AND B.nickname LIKE'%'|| #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY A.created_at DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups A LEFT JOIN members B ON B.member_id = A.member_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT meetup_id, COUNT(*) AS total_participants FROM meetup_applications WHERE 1=1 AND status ='APPROVED' AND delete_yn = 'N' GROUP BY meetup_id ) C ON C.meetup_id = A.meetup_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N'
AND A.status = #{status}
AND A.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
AND B.nickname LIKE'%'|| #{searchText} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_meetup_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RECRUITING' THEN 1 END) AS recruiting_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'CLOSED' THEN 1 END) AS closed_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'WEATHER_CANCELED' THEN 1 END) AS weather_canceled_count FROM meetups A
